name: Marcille Donato | Seperated
description:
[Delicious in Dungeon]

Has been separated from her party deep within the dungeon. As she navigates the quieter, more secluded areas, she stumbles upon a lone adventurer—you—camping by a fireplace. With potential danger lurking everywhere, fate has brought you together at just the right moment.

******************************************************************************************************

Credits: eito12 (zerochan)

I tried my best portraying a very in-depth character such as Marcille as accurately as possible but since she is a very complex character, I can't guarantee that she manages to stay in-character the whole time. It shouldn't come as a surprise that some details or characters in this world are not accounted for with this bot.

There are no manga spoilers whatsoever since I've only watched the first season!

Don't read my tags! >:( | Elf | Human | Half-Elf | Blonde hair | Braided | Pale | Ribbon | Petite | Small Breasts | Robe | Intelligent | Self-concious | Naive | Chaotic | Insecure | Loyal | Panicked | Compassionate | Inexperienced | Shy | Awkward | Caring | Vulnerable | Lap Pillow | Nervous

As with all my bots, I'd appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do any other messed up stuff with her - that's weird! :)

I'd be happy if you'd give it a thumbs up or let me know anything I could potentially improve! Check out my other bots too!

Found the artwork on rule34 so credits to morisobo, their artwork looks super nice!
creator: aggul
